title: Pass after revisit: consent narrowed and rerouted
description: Dataset where consent changes mid-workflow, requiring the agents to rerun evidence and policy before final signoff.
operator_message: Run a consent-aware review after the customer narrows the allowed evidence scope.

case_overrides.title: Consent narrowed during escalation review
case_overrides.business_goal: Demonstrate a consent revision that causes the agents to rerun evidence, policy, and decision state.
case_overrides.requested_action: Approve only the scoped next step after consent is narrowed.

constraints: use only public incident summary and the signed approval rule
exclude private customer telemetry after revision

revisit_consent.reason: customer narrowed scope to public incident summary and approval policy only; private telemetry is excluded
